'''F-24-AMTx''', also known simply as '''F-24''', was a [[Gender/Legends|masculine]]<ref name="Star Tours" /> [[F series repair droid]]<ref name="Convenient Daily Departures: The History of Star Tours" /> with [[Color/Legends|green]] [[Photoreceptor/Legends|photoreceptors]] and silver plating, with a red trim.<ref name="Star Tours" /> By the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[4 ABY/Legends|4.3 ABY]],<ref name="KOTHB">{{Blog|holocron|7|Death Star timeline}}</ref> he was employed by the [[Star Tours/Legends|Star Tours]] travel agency at their [[Tomorrowland Starport]]. Along with [[F-23-DKMx]], F-24 performed the final assembly of [[StarSpeeder 3000]] and serviced their [[Ion engine/Legends|ion engines]], and was stationed in front of a vertical moving lift.<ref name="Complete Guide to Star Tours">''[[Complete Guide to Star Tours]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
{{Quote|Works with F-23 in the Hangar.|F-24's description in ''Complete Guide to Star Tours''|<ref name="Complete Guide to Star Tours" />}}
F-24-AMTx was created for [[Tokyo Disneyland]]'s [[Wikipedia:Simulator ride|simulator ride]] [[Wikipedia:Amusement park|theme park]] attraction [[Star Tours (real-world)|''Star Tours'']], which opened on [[July 12]], [[1989]].<ref name="Star Tours" /> In ''[[Star Tours: The Adventures Continue]]'', the ride's sequel, a what appears to be a modified F-24 has now been moved further inside the queue, though his name is no longer visible. The droid and two others have been posed in a similar manner to a [[W:c:Disney:Hitchhiking Ghosts|trio of ghosts]] seen at the end of the [[Wikipedia:Haunted Mansion|Haunted Mansion]] ride in various Disney theme parks.<ref name="The Adventures Continue">''[[Star Tours: The Adventures Continue]]''</ref>
